validated_commands.test: python3 -m uv run pytest tests/unit tests/test_console.py -x -q
validated_commands.test_full: python3 -m uv run pytest tests/unit tests/test_console.py -q
validated_commands.format: python3 -m uv run black . && python3 -m uv run isort .
validated_commands.install_dev: pip install uv --break-system-packages && python3 -m uv sync --extra dev
validated_commands.notes: uv is not on PATH in CI; use 'pip install uv --break-system-packages' then 'python3 -m uv'. Do NOT use --cov: causes PyYAML global state corruption. Rich outputs ANSI styling codes (\x1b[3m italic, \x1b[1m bold) even with NO_COLOR=1; strip ANSI with regex r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*[A-Za-z]' before text assertions. _ascii_only must strip ANSI first - fixed in PR 2026-04-27.

coverage_baseline.notes: All 5516 tests pass as of 2026-04-27 main. Previous count was 5476 (policy_status tests excluded due to failure). Fix restores 40 tests in test_policy_status.py.

yaml_pollution_note: Running tests with --cov causes PyYAML global state corruption from some earlier test. Tests pass without --cov.
ansi_note: Rich outputs ANSI codes (italic \x1b[3m, bold \x1b[1m) even with NO_COLOR=1. Use regex r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*[A-Za-z]' to strip before text assertions. Fixed in test_policy_status.py _ascii_only helper via PR 2026-04-27.
lockfile_format_note: Lockfile is apm.lock.yaml (LOCKFILE_NAME constant). Tests should write apm.lock.yaml.
lazy_import_note: RegistryIntegration imported lazily inside mcp.py. Patch 'apm_cli.registry.integration.RegistryIntegration'.
deps_utils_note: _is_nested_under_package and _count_primitives now fully tested (43 tests in test_deps_utils.py). Maintainer added these tests.

testing_backlog.notes: Large complex file ~2804 lines. Core install logic. High risk. Deferred.
Display helpers covered in PR; main command logic still sparse.
list/tree/info covered. Main update() orchestration still complex.

completed_work.description: Fixed 7 pre-existing test failures in test_policy_status.py. _ascii_only was rejecting Rich ANSI codes. Strip CSI sequences before check. 5476->5516 tests passing.
completed_work.note: All previous Test Improver PRs appear closed/merged - none showing as open.

completed_work.description: Task1: 3933 tests pass. Task2: Identified _utils.py gaps (since covered by maintainer).
